title: cuphea sclerophylla
intro: Cuphea sclerophylla, also known as the hairy cuphea or hairy firecracker plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cuphea sclerophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cuphea sclerophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
